title: Puerto Banus Hen Party: Yacht Hire Guide 2026
html:
Planning a hen party in Puerto Banus? Private yacht hire from the iconic marina offers a glamorous day on the Mediterranean, with prices starting around €3,500 for a half-day Fairline. BoatHire24 connects you directly with skippered charters, making it simple to compare options and secure the perfect boat for your celebration.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most charters depart from Puerto Banus marina, a world‑famous harbour in Marbella on the Costa del Sol. The marina is surrounded by designer boutiques and Michelin‑starred restaurants, making it a perfect pre‑ or post‑cruise spot. You can find a skippered charter in a few minutes.

Popular departure points include the main dock near the casino, Club de Mar, and the newer pontoon at La Plaza. From there, you can cruise west to Cabopino beach or east towards Marbella’s Golden Mile and the old town. One option worth a look is the Fairline for hire.

For a full‑day trip, head south to the Bay of Gibraltar or anchor off the coast of Estepona. The Mediterranean is calm in summer, with gentle winds from the west, making it ideal for party boats and luxury yachts.

Which boat to rent

  1. Fairline 53 flybridge, Best for a stylish party with up to 10 guests; from €3,500 for 4 hours. You can book the Fairline for hire directly.
  2. Azimut 40, Ideal for a smaller group of 6‑8; from €2,500 for half a day.
  3. Lagoon 450 catamaran, Spacious deck for 12 guests, perfect for sunbathing and swimming; from €4,800 for a full day.
  4. Axopar 37, Sporty RIB for a lively crew of 8; from €1,800 for 3 hours.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Hen party yacht hire in Puerto Banus starts around €1,500 for a small motorboat and rises to €6,000 for a crewed luxury yacht for a full day. Prices vary by season, boat size, and extras like catering or watersports equipment. You can also see more at check availability.

  • Shared tour on a small boat: from €100 per person, minimum 6 guests
  • Small motorboat (e.g. Axopar) half‑day: from €1,800
  • Catamaran full‑day for 12: from €4,800
  • Crewed flybridge (Fairline 53) full‑day: from €5,500

All prices are in EUR and include a skipper unless otherwise stated. For the best value, you can find a skippered charter via the listings on BoatHire24, which allow you to filter by capacity and price. To see how booking works, visit the booking FAQ.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

No, you do not need a licence for a skippered charter, the operator provides a professional skipper. If you want to drive a bareboat yourself, you will need a valid International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or an equivalent national licence. Always confirm the exact requirements with the operator before booking.

Local tip: In July and August, the Mediterranean can get choppy due to the Levante wind. Book a morning slot from 10am to 2pm for the calmest conditions and the best light for photos.

At a glance

  • Price range: €1,500, €6,000 per day
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 3 hours to full day
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests (Hen party groups welcome)
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I bring my own food and drink on a private yacht hire?

Most charters allow you to bring your own food and drink, though some offer catering packages with local seafood and Spanish wines.

What is the cancellation policy for hen party charters?

Cancellation policies vary by operator, but many offer free cancellation up to 14 days before the trip; check the booking FAQ for specific terms.

Is there a minimum age for guests on a motor yacht?

Children are welcome on most boats, but some luxury charters set a minimum age of 12 for safety and insurance reasons; always confirm with the operator.

Can I add a watersports package to my Puerto Banus hen party?

Many charter operators offer extras such as jet skis, paddleboards, or a photographer for an additional fee, enquire when you book.

Whether you are celebrating a hen do or simply want a taste of the high life, Puerto Banus delivers with its glamorous marina, warm Mediterranean waters, and luxury yacht scene. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. To secure your preferred date, check availability on boathire24.com and compare verified listings. If you own a boat, consider becoming a host and earning from the 2026 peak season.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
